## Summary

Fix layout issues on the Revise Workbench page:
1. **Buttons in a proper flex row** — Reset Queue, TrustedPath, and Final Review / Apply & Export now stay in a single horizontal flex container using `position: static` instead of individually absolute-positioned elements that escaped the flex parent.
2. **Diagnosis section tighter** — "Diagnosis & Guardrails" header, severity/scope pills, and h2 title all use reduced padding so the diagnostic rows sit closer together.
3. **Title separation** — Added a subtle border-top + margin-top to the h2 title to visually separate it from the pill row above.

## Scope

- `app/workbench-v2/page.tsx` — Adjusted fixed container position (`top-[48px]`, `gap-2`), added `workbench-v2-final-review-link` class to the Final Review link.
- `app/workbench-v2/workbench-v2.module.css` — Changed TrustedPath and Final Review from absolute positioning to `position: static` so they stay inside the flex parent. Added `.workbench-v2-reset-queue` sizing. Tightened diagnosis section padding.
- `components/revision/ResetQueueButton.tsx` — Added `workbench-v2-reset-queue` class for CSS module sizing.

Does NOT touch: revision logic, evaluation pipeline, data flow, or any non-layout code.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

Low risk — CSS-only changes. The main change is removing `top`/`right` absolute positioning from TrustedPath and Final Review link in favor of static positioning within the flex container. If the flex container's `fixed` position needs further tuning on different screen sizes, may need follow-up.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — layout-only CSS changes, no pipeline code touched.
